narration: What if I told you cells have a built-in lifespan?
visual_description: Hook visual: What if I told you cells have a built-in lifespan?
ai_image_prompt: Hook visual: What if I told you cells have a built-in lifespan?
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Hook visual: What if I told you cells have a built-in lifespan?

narration: This is the Hayflick limit—where cells can only divide about 50 times.
visual_description: Context visual: This is the Hayflick limit—where cells can only divide about 50 times.
ai_image_prompt: Context visual: This is the Hayflick limit—where cells can only divide about 50 times.
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Context visual: This is the Hayflick limit—where cells can only divide about 50 times.

narration: Every time they divide, they're inching closer to aging.
visual_description: Escalation visual: Every time they divide, they're inching closer to aging.
ai_image_prompt: Escalation visual: Every time they divide, they're inching closer to aging.
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Escalation visual: Every time they divide, they're inching closer to aging.

narration: This limit stems from telomere shortening. When telomeres are too short, cells stop dividing.
visual_description: Evidence visual: This limit stems from telomere shortening. When telomeres are too short, cells stop dividing.
ai_image_prompt: Evidence visual: This limit stems from telomere shortening. When telomeres are too short, cells stop dividing.
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Evidence visual: This limit stems from telomere shortening. When telomeres are too short, cells stop dividing.

narration: Understanding this can unlock secrets to aging and health. But, we’re still learning.
visual_description: Payoff visual: Understanding this can unlock secrets to aging and health. But, we’re still learning.
ai_image_prompt: Payoff visual: Understanding this can unlock secrets to aging and health. But, we’re still learning.
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Payoff visual: Understanding this can unlock secrets to aging and health. But, we’re still learning.
